title: Luhansk: 186 Ukrainians are returning home 👤 Another exchange took place...
title_en: Luhansk: 186 Ukrainians are returning home 👤 Another exchange took place...

description: 186 Ukrainians are returning home 👤 Another exchange took place today, during which 185 Defensemen were released from Muscovite captivity by the coordination headquarters for the treatment of prisoners of war. Separately, it was also possible to return to the Motherland one Ukrainian civilian who had been held captive by Muscovites since 2022. 🗒 Among those dismissed today are servicemen of the Armed Forces of Ukraine, in particular representatives of...
description_en: 186 Ukrainians are returning home 👤 Another exchange took place today, during which 185 Defensemen were released from Muscovite captivity by the coordination headquarters for the treatment of prisoners of war. Separately, it was also possible to return to the Motherland one Ukrainian civilian who had been held captive by Muscovites since 2022. 🗒 Among those dismissed today are servicemen of the Armed Forces of Ukraine, in particular representatives of...
description_uk: Додому повертаються 186 українців 👤 Сьогодні відбувся черговий обмін, в межах якого координаційним штабом з питань поводження з військовополоненими з московитської неволі визволено 185 Оборонців. Окремо також вдалося повернути на Батьківщину одного цивільного українця, якого московити утримували в неволі з 2022 року. 🗒 Серед звільнених сьогодні військовослужбовці ЗСУ, зокрема представники...

description: Control points and enemy personnel were hit. The results of other attacks have been clarified. On June 4 and on the night of June 5, 2026, units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine inflicted damage on a number of enemy targets. ⚡️In particular, the enemy's command post in the Kamiansky district (Zaporizhia region), as well as the unit's command and observation post in the Soledar district (Donetsk region), was hit. ⚡️Also affected...
description_en: Control points and enemy personnel were hit. The results of other attacks have been clarified. On June 4 and on the night of June 5, 2026, units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine inflicted damage on a number of enemy targets. ⚡️In particular, the enemy's command post in the Kamiansky district (Zaporizhia region), as well as the unit's command and observation post in the Soledar district (Donetsk region), was hit. ⚡️Also affected...
description_uk: Уражено пункти управління та особовий склад противника. Уточнено результати інших уражень 4 червня та в ніч на 5 червня 2026 року підрозділи Сил оборони України завдали ураження по низці об'єктів ворога. ⚡️Зокрема, уражено пункт управління противника в районі Кам'янського (Запорізька область), а також командно-спостережний пункт підрозділу в районі Соледара (Донецька область). ⚡️Також уражено...

title: During the night, "Birds of Magyar" "roasted" five occupiers' ships...
title_en: During the night, "Birds of Magyar" "roasted" five occupiers' ships...
title_uk: За ніч «Птахи мадярські» «підсмажили» п’ять кораблів окупантів…
description: During the night, "Birds of Magyar" "roasted" five occupiers' ships in the Sea of ​​Azov. Dry cargo ships and a tanker, which were used to transport goods through the ports of Mariupol and Berdyansk, were hit. Some of the ships went with painted names and turned off radars.
description_en: During the night, "Birds of Magyar" "roasted" five occupiers' ships in the Sea of ​​Azov. Dry cargo ships and a tanker, which were used to transport goods through the ports of Mariupol and Berdyansk, were hit. Some of the ships went with painted names and turned off radars.
description_uk: «Птахи Мадяра» за ночь «поджарили» сразу пять судов оккупантов в Азовском море Под удар попали сухогрузы и танкер, которые использовались для перевозки грузов через порты Мариуполя и Бердянска. Часть судов ходила с закрашенными названиями и выключенными радарами.

title: Kharkiv: Strike confirmed on residential building
title_en: Kharkiv: Strike confirmed on residential building
title_uk: Харків: підтверджено удар по житловому будинку
description: The list of the next "victories" of Russia in a few days was replenished with the factory "Yagotynskoe for children", which produced baby food. In the Kyiv region, rescue operations are ongoing at the site of this impact - units of the State Emergency Service have already extinguished the fire. As of now, seven people are known to be injured. Unfortunately, four people died. My condolences to family and friends. This list also includes food warehouses and the postal service...
description_en: The list of the next "victories" of Russia in a few days was replenished with the factory "Yagotynskoe for children", which produced baby food. In the Kyiv region, rescue operations are ongoing at the site of this impact - units of the State Emergency Service have already extinguished the fire. As of now, seven people are known to be injured. Unfortunately, four people died. My condolences to family and friends. This list also includes food warehouses and the postal service...
description_uk: Перелік чергових «перемог» Росії за кілька днів поповнився заводом «Яготинське для дітей», що виробляв дитяче харчування. На Київщині тривають рятувальні роботи на місці цього удару – підрозділи ДСНС уже ліквідували пожежу. Станом на зараз відомо про сімох поранених. На жаль, чотири людини загинули. Мої співчуття рідним і близьким. Також серед цього переліку продовольчі склади та поштовий сервіс...
